protocol: 4-byte LE length prefix + UTF-8 JSON frame; ops live.echo/status/list_documents/stop
evidence: runs/m02_pump_test (accoreconsole CADAGENT_PUMP + pipe client, PUMP_PROTOCOL_OK True), tests/integration/test_live_arx_pump.py
